name: Input Capture via Screen Recording Tools
description: Detects use of screen recording or screen capture tools for data collection
query:
// Detect screen recording and capture tools
// Trigger on ffmpeg screen capture or recording tools
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(ffmpeg.*-f\s+(x11grab|gdigrab|avfoundation)|screencapture|import\s+-window|nircmd.*savescreenshot)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 120 seconds
